_comment: SafeLens worker model registry (EXAMPLE). Copy to model_registry.json and set MODEL_REGISTRY_PATH. Documents id/backend/tasks/license/weights source per model. WEIGHTS ARE NEVER COMMITTED OR BAKED INTO THE IMAGE (commit_weights:false): they resolve at runtime from the HF cache, /runpod-volume, or an approved URL, and are sha256-verified when set. VLM/GroundingDINO weights must not be downloaded during Docker build.

detectors.license_status: AGPL-3.0 (verify before commercial use; Ultralytics Enterprise License required for closed-source/commercial)
detectors.weights_source: runtime: ultralytics auto-download into YOLO26_CACHE_DIR (/runpod-volume) or external registry

detectors.license_status: verify (Ultralytics family; treat as AGPL unless confirmed)
detectors.weights_source: runtime: baked best-effort into /app/models/yolo26 or auto-download into cache

detectors.license_status: Apache-2.0 (commercial-safe; original lyuwenyu/RT-DETR, NOT the Ultralytics AGPL wrapper)

reasoners.license_status: Apache-2.0 (verify checkpoint card before commercial use)
reasoners.weights_source: runtime: HF cache / /runpod-volume/models/qwen-vl (NEVER downloaded at Docker build)

reasoners.license_status: VERIFY: DeepSeek-VL2 is the visual model (NOT R1/V3 text models). Confirm license before commercial use.

scanners.authority: candidate_only (never an official HSE alert without deterministic confirmation or human review)
